MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Maule, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company
Paul Arshawsky, Esq., counsel for plaintiff

Phillip Allen aka Phillip Allen, Jr., defendant
Elizabeth Cannon Johnsen, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 1095 Mission Street, #205, San Francisco, California.

Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Verdica Puri, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
